reasoning: Lacking a working search tool or valid Polymarket URL to fetch real-world data up to November 9, 2025, I must rely on a baseline estimate. If this question refers to 2024 (as the exact dynamic of 4 cuts perfectly matches the 2024 scenario where the Fed cut 50 bps in Sept, 25 in Nov, leaving exactly one 25 bps cut in Dec to hit 4 total cuts), CME FedWatch priced the December cut at ~65% probability around Nov 9. If it genuinely asks for 2025 a year ahead or in a simulated 2025, predicting exactly 4 cuts over a full year is historically lower (15-25%), though 4 cuts was the Fed's dot plot projection for 2025. Given the phrasing heavily mirrors the 2024 specific rate cut count and the possibility of a year-shift typo in the dataset, 65% forms the most robust focal point.
